hero.sub: Fresh, traceable, award-winning roast. Buy to enjoy, or become an ambassador and sell specialty coffee with real profits and constant training.
hero.ctaAmb: I want to be an ambassador
hero.pathBuyDesc: Buy pounds of specialty coffee at retail. Shipping across Colombia.
hero.pathAmbTitle: I want to start a business 📈
hero.pathAmbDesc: Sell at wholesale price or under your own brand. No franchise.

methods.sub: Every brew reveals something different about the bean. This is part of what we teach our ambassadors.

origin.p: We work directly with coffee growers from award-winning regions of Colombia. Each lot arrives with its sheet: farm, altitude, variety, process and cupping notes. Roasted by profile, not by trend.

shop.subCliente: Fresh roast, traceable origin and cupping notes in every pound. Shipping across Colombia.
shop.subEmbajador: Ambassador prices per pound. Buy wholesale, sell retail and keep the difference.

product.addedCliente: ✓ Added to cart. Shipping across Colombia.
product.addedEmbajador: ✓ Added to wholesale order. Your advisor will confirm availability.

ambassador.sub: Buy at wholesale, sell under your brand or ours, and grow with training and an AI assistant by your side. No franchise.
ambassador.benefitsH2: More than coffee: a business with support
ambassador.calcSub: Adjust how many pounds you sell per month and at what price. We'll show your estimated profit.
ambassador.aiSub: Our smart agent watches your order dates and alerts you, via WhatsApp or email, when it's a good time to reorder or contact a client. Never lose a sale to forgetfulness again.

blog.sub: Videos, guides and tips on coffee, roasting and sales strategy. Learn at your pace and sell better.

footer.about: Colombian specialty coffee. Fresh roast for those who enjoy, and those who start a business.
footer.nlSub: Coffee, roasting and sales tips. Every week.
